subparts_en.text: A ball of mass $m$ moves with velocity $v$. It undergoes a partially elastic collision (coefficient of restitution $e$) with a board at an angle $\alpha$ to the normal. What is the vertical component of momentum?

subparts_en.label: b

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: What is the difference in momentum before and after the collision?

subparts_en.label: d
subparts_en.text:
Calculate the force exerted by the board on the ball?

Gravitational acceleration $g$.

title: Gerak Vertikal Benda pada Karet

subparts.label: a
subparts.text: Hitung posisi terjauh dari titik yang dapat dicapai benda itu.

subparts.label: b
subparts.text: Hitung berapa energi kinetik dan energi potensial di titik terendah.

subparts.label: c
subparts.text: Hitung berapa energi kinetik dan energi potensial di titik keseimbangan.

subparts.label: d
subparts.text: Benda akan bergerak bolak-balik. Namun jika ia mempunyai gesekan udara, benda akan berhenti di suatu titik. Di mana posisi titik ini?

body_md:
Sebuah benda digantung dengan sebuah karet yang mempunyai konstanta pegas . Di mana adalah massa benda dan adalah panjang karet dalam keadaan normal. Kemudian dinaikkan sampai ke pusat gantungan (titik ) dan dilepas tanpa kecepatan awal.

![](_page_0_Picture_17.jpeg)

- (a) Hitung posisi terjauh dari titik yang dapat dicapai benda itu.
- (b) Hitung berapa energi kinetik dan energi potensial di titik terendah.

- (c) Hitung berapa energi kinetik dan energi potensial di titik keseimbangan.
- (d) Benda akan bergerak bolak-balik. Namun jika ia mempunyai gesekan udara, benda akan berhenti di suatu titik. Di mana posisi titik ini?
body_md_raw:
Sebuah benda digantung dengan sebuah karet yang mempunyai konstanta pegas . Di mana adalah massa benda dan adalah panjang karet dalam keadaan normal. Kemudian dinaikkan sampai ke pusat gantungan (titik ) dan dilepas tanpa kecepatan awal.

![](_page_0_Picture_17.jpeg)

- (a) Hitung posisi terjauh dari titik yang dapat dicapai benda itu.

title_en: Vertical Motion of a Body on a Rubber Band
body_md_en:
A body is suspended by a rubber band with a spring constant . Let be the mass of the body and be the length of the rubber band in its normal state. It is then raised to the suspension point (point ) and released from rest.

![](_page_0_Picture_17.jpeg)

- (a) Calculate the farthest position from the point that the body can reach.
- (b) Calculate the kinetic energy and potential energy at the lowest point.

- (c) Calculate the kinetic energy and potential energy at the equilibrium point.
- (d) The body will oscillate. However, if it experiences air friction, the body will stop at a certain point. Where is the position of this point?

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: Calculate the farthest position from the point that the body can reach.

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: Calculate the kinetic energy and potential energy at the lowest point.

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: Calculate the kinetic energy and potential energy at the equilibrium point.

subparts_en.label: d

title: Bandul Menumbuk Papan dengan Kehilangan Energi

subparts.label: a
subparts.text: Hitung energi kinetik bandul sesaat sebelum menumbuk papan!

subparts.label: b
subparts.text: Hitung kecepatan (besar dan arah) bandul sesaat setelah tumbukan.

subparts.label: c
subparts.text: Hitung sudut terbesar yang dicapai bandul setelah 1 kali tumbukan.

subparts.label: d
subparts.text: Apakah bandul akan menumbuk papan untuk kedua kalinya? Berikan alasan dan bukti-bukti perhitungan kalian.

body_md:
Sebuah bandul dilepas pada sudut $^1$ (tan $^1$ = 0,8). Ketika bandul membentuk sudut $^2$ (lihat gambar, tan $^2$ = 0,6), bandul menumbuk papan. Setiap kali menumbuk papan, energi kinetik bandul hilang sebesar 1/4-nya. Panjang bandul = 0,2 m. Massa bandul 1 kg.

![](_page_1_Picture_8.jpeg)

- (a) Hitung energi kinetik bandul sesaat sebelum menumbuk papan!
- (b) Hitung kecepatan (besar dan arah) bandul sesaat setelah tumbukan.
- (c) Hitung sudut terbesar yang dicapai bandul setelah 1 kali tumbukan.
- (d) Apakah bandul akan menumbuk papan untuk kedua kalinya? Berikan alasan dan bukti-bukti perhitungan kalian.
body_md_raw:
Sebuah bandul dilepas pada sudut <sup>1</sup> (tan <sup>1</sup> = 0,8). Ketika bandul membentuk sudut <sup>2</sup> (lihat gambar, tan <sup>2</sup> = 0,6), bandul menumbuk papan. Setiap kali menumbuk papan, energi kinetik bandul hilang sebesar 1/4-nya. Panjang bandul = 0,2 m. Massa bandul 1 kg.

![](_page_1_Picture_8.jpeg)

- (a) Hitung energi kinetik bandul sesaat sebelum menumbuk papan!
- (b) Hitung kecepatan (besar dan arah) bandul sesaat setelah tumbukan.
- (c) Hitung sudut terbesar yang dicapai bandul setelah 1 kali tumbukan.
- (d) Apakah bandul akan menumbuk papan untuk kedua kalinya? Berikan alasan dan bukti-bukti perhitungan kalian.

title_en: A Pendulum Striking a Board with Energy Loss
body_md_en:
A pendulum is released at an angle $^1$ (tan $^1$ = 0,8). When the pendulum forms an angle $^2$ (see figure, tan $^2$ = 0,6), it strikes the board. Each time it strikes the board, the pendulum loses 1/4 of its kinetic energy. Length of the pendulum = 0,2 m. Mass of the pendulum = 1 kg.

![](_page_1_Picture_8.jpeg)

- (a) Calculate the kinetic energy of the pendulum immediately before striking the board!
- (b) Calculate the velocity (magnitude and direction) of the pendulum immediately after the collision.
- (c) Calculate the maximum angle reached by the pendulum after one collision.
- (d) Will the pendulum strike the board a second time? Provide reasoning and your calculation steps.

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: Calculate the kinetic energy of the pendulum immediately before striking the board!

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: Calculate the velocity (magnitude and direction) of the pendulum immediately after the collision.

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: Calculate the maximum angle reached by the pendulum after one collision.

subparts_en.label: d
subparts_en.text: Will the pendulum strike the board a second time? Provide reasoning and your calculation steps.

title_en: Elastic Collision of Two Balls on a Frictionless Track
body_md_en:
A ball is dropped (falls freely) from a point $A$. The location of point $A$ is shown in the figure. The ball moves freely along a frictionless track (track radius $R$). At the end of the track, there is a ball with a mass twice that of $m$. They undergo a perfectly elastic collision.

![](_page_1_Picture_15.jpeg)

- (a) Calculate the velocity of ball $m$ just before it collides with ball $2m$.
- (b) Calculate the velocity of ball $m$ just after colliding with ball $2m$.
- (c) What is the maximum height reached by object $2m$?
- (d) After the collision, ball $m$ returns into the track. Calculate the maximum height reached by object $m$ measured from the bottom of the track.

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: Calculate the velocity of ball $m$ just before it collides with ball $2m$.

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: Calculate the velocity of ball $m$ just after colliding with ball $2m$.

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: What is the maximum height reached by object $2m$?

subparts_en.label: d
subparts_en.text: After the collision, ball $m$ returns into the track. Calculate the maximum height reached by object $m$ measured from the bottom of the track.

title: Menentukan Massa Papan Agar Bola Mendarat Kembali di Titik P
body_md:

title_en: Determine the Mass of the Board So That the Ball Lands Back at Point P
body_md_en:
A small ball of mass $m$ is placed on a board of mass $M$ that rests on a smooth horizontal surface. The ball is then given a velocity $v_0$. See the figure below. The ball leaves the board at point $P$. Calculate the value of $M$ so that the ball lands back at point $P$.

title: Sudut Elevasi untuk Panjang Lintasan Maksimum
body_md:
Sebuah bola dilemparkan dengan laju dari dasar bidang datar dan sudut elevasinya . Supaya panjang lintasannya maksimum maka harus memenuhi syarat …

Petunjuk:

$$\int \sqrt{1+z^2} \, dz = \frac{1}{2} \left[ z \sqrt{1+z^2} + \ln(z + \sqrt{1+z^2}) \right] + C$$

title: Keranjang Bocor yang Ditarik dengan Tegangan Konstan

subparts.label: a
subparts.text: Berapa energi kinetik pasir dalam keranjang sebagai fungsi jarak terhadap dinding? Berapa nilai maksimumnya?

subparts.label: b
subparts.text: Berapa momentumnya sebagai fungsi jarak terhadap dinding? Berapa nilai maksimumnya?

body_md:
Sebuah keranjang yang massanya dapat diabaikan, mula-mula berisi pasir dengan massa $m_0$. Keranjang dihubungkan ke dinding dengan seutas tali (massa tali diabaikan) dengan tegangan tali tetap $T$ (tidak tergantung panjang tali). Gesekan dengan lantai diabaikan. Panjang tali mula-mula $L$. Setelah beberapa saat, jarak keranjang terhadap dinding $x$ dan massa pasir $m$. Setelah keranjang mulai bergerak ke arah dinding, keranjang bocor sehingga pasir keluar dengan laju $\frac{dm}{dt} = -k$.

![](_page_1_Picture_13.jpeg)

- (a) Berapa energi kinetik pasir dalam keranjang sebagai fungsi jarak terhadap dinding? Berapa nilai maksimumnya?
- (b) Berapa momentumnya sebagai fungsi jarak terhadap dinding? Berapa nilai maksimumnya?

title_en: Leaky Basket Pulled with Constant Tension
body_md_en:
A basket of negligible mass initially contains sand with mass $m_0$. The basket is connected to a wall by a string (string mass negligible) with a constant tension $T$ (independent of the string's length). Friction with the floor is negligible. The initial length of the string is $L$. After some time, the distance of the basket from the wall is $x$ and the mass of the sand is $m$. After the basket starts moving toward the wall, it leaks so that sand exits at a rate of $\frac{dm}{dt} = -k$.

![](_page_1_Picture_13.jpeg)

- (a) What is the kinetic energy of the sand in the basket as a function of the distance from the wall? What is its maximum value?
- (b) What is its momentum as a function of the distance from the wall? What is its maximum value?

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: What is the kinetic energy of the sand in the basket as a function of the distance from the wall? What is its maximum value?

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: What is its momentum as a function of the distance from the wall? What is its maximum value?

title: Kebutuhan Bahan Bakar untuk Pendaratan Pesawat di Bulan

subparts.label: i
subparts.text:
Pesawat mencapai permukaan bulan di titik yang berada pada sisi yang berlawanan dengan titik .

(ii) Pesawat menyentuh permukaan bulan secara tangensial pada titik setelah pesawat memberikan momentum ke pusat bulan saat ia berada di titik .

Hitunglah jumlah bahan bakar yang dibutuhkan () untuk kedua kasus tersebut di atas.

![](_page_2_Picture_7.jpeg)

body_md:
Pesawat ruang angkasa dengan massa mengorbit bulan dalam lintasan melingkar pada ketinggian ℎ dari permukaan bulan. Pesawat akan mendarat di permukaan bulan. Mesin jet pesawat ini dinyalakan di titik dalam waktu yang singkat. Kecepatan gas buang dari penyembur adalah relatif terhadap pesawat tersebut. Jari-jari bulan , percepatan gravitasi di permukaan bulan . Pesawat ini dapat mencapai permukaan bulan dengan dua cara:

(i) Pesawat mencapai permukaan bulan di titik yang berada pada sisi yang berlawanan dengan titik .

(ii) Pesawat menyentuh permukaan bulan secara tangensial pada titik setelah pesawat memberikan momentum ke pusat bulan saat ia berada di titik .

Hitunglah jumlah bahan bakar yang dibutuhkan () untuk kedua kasus tersebut di atas.

![](_page_2_Picture_7.jpeg)

Program Persiapan OSN Fisika
Dibimbing langsung oleh Kak Basyir - Peraih Medali EMAS OSN Fisika 2018

Apa itu FZTI?

From Zero to Infinity adalah program pelatihan fisika yang dirancang untuk membawa siswa:

- 🔁 dari konsep dasar
- 🔁 menuju cara berpikir olimpiade

Program ini cocok untuk kamu yang ...
 Baru mulai tertarik fisika olimpiade
 Ingin persiapan OSN lebih awal & terstruktur

- •Mau punya fondasi kuat sebelum OSK
- •Ingin belajar **lebih dalam dari fisika sekolah №** *Tidak perlu jago dulu — program ini dimulai dari nol.*

#### **Target Peserta**

- •Siswa SMP Kelas 9 dan SMA Kelas 10-11
- •Cocok untuk:
  - Pemula (belaiar dari nol)
  - Siswa berpengalaman (pengayaan soal level tinggi)
- Cocok untuk Target OSN
- Persiapan dini OSK
- 🌔 Fondasi kuat menuju OSP & OSN
- Sangat ideal mulai dari SMP kelas 3

- · Online & fleksibel
- · Modul PDF lengkap
- Solusi detail semua soal
- Video pembahasan
- · Bisa diulang kapan saja
- Cocok sambil sekolah

  - 💵 10 modul mekanika inti
    - @ Materi mencakup:

- Setara meng-khatamkan buku
   David Morin Classical Mechanics

Diskusi langsung dengan **Kak Basyir** Grup WA diskusi (*Focus Group*) Bebas bertanya & berdiskusi konsep

Bukan cuma nonton materi — tapi dilatih cara berpikir fisikawan.

title_en: Fuel Requirement for a Spacecraft Landing on the Moon
body_md_en:
A spacecraft with mass orbits the Moon in a circular path at a height ℎ above the lunar surface. The spacecraft will land on the lunar surface. The spacecraft's jet engine is fired briefly at a point. The exhaust velocity of the jet is relative to the spacecraft. The Moon's radius , the gravitational acceleration at the lunar surface . The spacecraft can reach the lunar surface in two ways:

(i) The spacecraft reaches the lunar surface at a point on the opposite side from point .

(ii) The spacecraft touches down tangentially at point after the spacecraft imparts momentum to the Moon's center while it is at point .

Calculate the amount of fuel required () for both cases above.

![](_page_2_Picture_7.jpeg)

subparts_en.label: i
subparts_en.text:
The spacecraft reaches the lunar surface at a point on the opposite side from point .

(ii) The spacecraft touches down tangentially at point after the spacecraft imparts momentum to the Moon's center while it is at point .

Calculate the amount of fuel required () for both cases above.

![](_page_2_Picture_7.jpeg)

title_en: Determining Acceleration from the Liquid Height Difference in a Simple Accelerometer
body_md_en:
A simple accelerometer (a device to measure acceleration) is made by filling a U-shaped container with liquid (see figure). While moving to the left with a constant acceleration, the liquid surface heights in the left arm (ℎ1) and the right arm (ℎ2) are measured. Determine the acceleration under these conditions. Assume the diameter of the container is much smaller than ℎ$^1$ and ℎ2.

![](_page_0_Picture_9.jpeg)

title_en: Maximum Speed of a Yo-yo to Remain in Contact with the Inclined Plane

A yo-yo of radius rolls without slipping with speed on a horizontal surface, then falls onto an inclined plane with inclination angle (see figure). Assume the yo-yo's mass is concentrated at its center and the yo-yo moves without slipping.

title_en: Maximum Amplitude of a Two-Block System with Static Friction
body_md_en:
The system shown below is in equilibrium; the right spring is stretched by 1. The coefficient of friction between the two blocks is , and there is no friction between the lower block and the floor. The spring constants are respectively 3 and . The masses of the two blocks are respectively . Determine the maximum displacement (amplitude) of the system's oscillation such that the upper block remains stationary relative to the lower block. The mass of the spring may be neglected.

title: Pertambahan Energi Kinetik Ice Skater akibat Perubahan Momen Inersia
body_md: Seorang *ice skater* massanya 75 kg berputar dua putaran per detik pada sumbu vertikal yang melewati pusat massa badannya, dengan lengan terbuka horizontal. Kemudian ia dengan cepat menarik lengannya ke dalam sehingga kelajuan angulernya menjadi 6 putaran per detik. Anggap lengannya saat terbuka sebagai tongkat dengan panjang 1,4 meter dan massa 5 kg. Energi kinetik skater bertambah ketika ia menarik lengannya ke dalam. Apakah mungkin? Jika ya, hitunglah pertambahan energinya.
body_md_raw: Seorang *ice skater* massanya 75 kg berputar dua putaran per detik pada sumbu vertikal yang melewati pusat massa badannya, dengan lengan terbuka horizontal. Kemudian ia dengan cepat menarik lengannya ke dalam sehingga kelajuan angulernya menjadi 6 putaran per detik. Anggap lengannya saat terbuka sebagai tongkat dengan panjang 1,4 meter dan massa 5 kg. Energi kinetik skater bertambah ketika ia menarik lengannya ke dalam. Apakah mungkin? Jika ya, hitunglah pertambahan energinya.

title_en: Increase in Kinetic Energy of an Ice Skater due to Change in Moment of Inertia
body_md_en: A 75 kg *ice skater* rotates at 2 revolutions per second about a vertical axis passing through her center of mass, with her arms extended horizontally. She then quickly pulls her arms inward so that her angular speed becomes 6 revolutions per second. Assume her extended arms can be modeled as a rod of length 1.4 meters and mass 5 kg. The skater's kinetic energy increases when she pulls her arms inward. Is this possible? If so, calculate the increase in her energy.

Program Persiapan OSN Fisika
Dibimbing langsung oleh Kak Basyir - Peraih Medali EMAS OSN Fisika 2018

Apa itu FZTI?

From Zero to Infinity adalah program pelatihan fisika yang dirancang untuk membawa siswa:

- 🔁 dari konsep dasar
- 🔁 menuju cara berpikir olimpiade

Program ini cocok untuk kamu yang ...
 Baru mulai tertarik fisika olimpiade
 Ingin persiapan OSN lebih awal & terstruktur

- •Mau punya fondasi kuat sebelum OSK
- •Ingin belajar **lebih dalam dari fisika sekolah №** *Tidak perlu jago dulu — program ini dimulai dari nol.*

#### **Target Peserta**

- •Siswa SMP Kelas 9 dan SMA Kelas 10-11
- •Cocok untuk:
  - Pemula (belaiar dari nol)
  - Siswa berpengalaman (pengayaan soal level tinggi)
- Cocok untuk Target OSN
- Persiapan dini OSK
- 🌔 Fondasi kuat menuju OSP & OSN
- Sangat ideal mulai dari SMP kelas 3

#### Metode Pembelajaran

- · Online & fleksibel
- · Modul PDF lengkap
- Solusi detail semua soal
- Video pembahasan
- · Bisa diulang kapan saja
- Cocok sambil sekolah
- Belajar dari nol sampai level OSN
  - 💵 10 modul mekanika inti

      - •±95% OSK
      - •±60% OSP
      - •±40% OSN
- Setara meng-khatamkan buku

body_md:

- (a) percepatan balok/mobil (nyatakan dalam $T_1, T_2, T_3, T_4$, dan $g$)
- (b) jarak yang ditempuh mobil selama waktu $t$ (nyatakan dalam $T_1, T_2, T_3, T_4$, $a$, dan $g$)

title_en: Block Inside an Accelerating Car with Four Strings
body_md_en:
A block of mass $m$ is held by two horizontal strings and two vertical strings inside a car that is initially at rest. If the car is then accelerated with acceleration $a$, the block remains at rest relative to the car (the block's position does not change relative to the car). Determine:

- (a) the acceleration of the block/car (express in terms of $T_1, T_2, T_3, T_4$, and $g$)
- (b) the distance traveled by the car during time $t$ (express in terms of $T_1, T_2, T_3, T_4$, $a$, and $g$)

![](_page_0_Picture_11.jpeg)

subparts_en.label: a

subparts_en.label: b

title: Gaya Gesek antara Dua Prisma pada Bidang Datar Tanpa Gesekan
body_md:
Sebuah prisma bermassa $m$ dengan sudut $	heta = 45^	heta$ (lihat gambar) diletakkan pada bidang datar tanpa gesekan. Prisma yang lain, tetapi dengan massa yang sama $m$, diletakkan di atas prisma pertama (ukuran prisma pertama lebih besar dari prisma kedua). Sebuah gaya horizontal $F$ dikerjakan pada prisma yang di atas sehingga tidak bergerak terhadap prisma yang di bawah. Tentukan gaya gesek antara kedua prisma (nyatakan dalam $m$, $F$, dan $g$). $g$ = percepatan gravitasi bumi.

![](_page_0_Picture_14.jpeg)

title_en: Frictional Force between Two Prisms on a Frictionless Horizontal Surface
body_md_en:
A prism of mass $m$ with an angle $	heta = 45^	heta$ (see figure) is placed on a frictionless horizontal surface. Another prism, but with the same mass $m$, is placed on top of the first prism (the first prism is larger than the second). A horizontal force $F$ is applied to the upper prism so that it does not move relative to the lower prism. Determine the frictional force between the two prisms (express your answer in terms of $m$, $F$, and $g$). $g$ = acceleration due to gravity.

![](_page_0_Picture_14.jpeg)

title: Sudut Keseimbangan Stabil Cincin pada Lingkaran Berputar
body_md:
Lingkaran yang terbuat dari kawat dengan jari-jari bergerak melingkar tanpa gesekan pada sumbu vertikal yang melewati diameternya (lihat gambar). Kelajuan linear titik pada kawat di mana terletak cincin adalah . Jika cincin yang terletak pada kawat tersebut berada pada kesetimbangan, tentukan sudut yang memenuhi kesetimbangan stabil.

title: Tegangan Tali pada Sistem Katrol di Dalam Elevator Dipercepat
body_md:
Sebuah sistem ditunjukkan pada gambar di samping, diletakkan dalam elevator yang bergerak ke atas dengan percepatan $a$. Tentukan tegangan tali jika meja licin. Diketahui massa masing-masing balok serta percepatan gravitasi $g$. Pada sistem, balok bermassa $m_1$ berada di atas meja licin dan dihubungkan melalui katrol dengan balok bermassa $m_2$ yang tergantung.

title_en: Tension in the String of a Pulley System Inside an Accelerating Elevator
body_md_en:
A system is shown in the figure to the right, placed in an elevator moving upward with acceleration $a$. Determine the tension in the string if the table is frictionless. The masses of each block and the acceleration due to gravity $g$ are known. In the system, a block of mass $m_1$ rests on the frictionless table and is connected via a pulley to a hanging block of mass $m_2$.

![](_page_1_Picture_11.jpeg)

title: Waktu Minimum Perubahan Arah Momentum Pesawat Ruang Angkasa
body_md: Pesawat ruang angkasa dengan momentum akan mengubah arahnya. Arah yang baru membentuk sudut terhadap arah mula-mula dan kelajuannya dipertahankan tetap. Jika gaya konstan yang dihasilkan mesin , tentukan waktu minimum yang diperlukan mesin untuk mengubah arah tersebut. Asumsi mesin dapat diputar/dibelokkan sesuai dengan arah yang diperlukan pesawat ruang angkasa.

title_en: Minimum Time to Change the Momentum Direction of a Spacecraft
body_md_en: A spacecraft with momentum will change its direction. The new direction forms an angle with the initial direction, and its speed remains constant. If the engine produces a constant force, determine the minimum time required to change its direction. Assume the engine can be rotated or deflected to align with the required direction of the spacecraft.

title: Penentuan Ketinggian Awal Agar Jarak Horizontal Dua Bola Sama

Sebuah bola berongga mempunyai massa dan jari-jari yang sama dengan sebuah bola pejal (momen inersia bola berongga = 2 2 /3 dan momen inersia bola pejal = 2 2 /5). title_en: Determining the Initial Height for Equal Horizontal Distance of Two Spheres
body_md_en:
A hollow sphere has the same mass and radius as a solid sphere (moment of inertia of hollow sphere = 2/3 and moment of inertia of solid sphere = 2/5). The hollow sphere rolls without slipping down an inclined plane from a height of 1 meter (see figure). Determine the initial height $h'$ for the solid sphere so that the horizontal distance traveled by both spheres is the same.

![](_page_2_Picture_12.jpeg)

title: Lemparan Vertikal ke Atas dengan Gaya Hambat Konstan

subparts.label: a

body_md:
Sebuah batu bermassa $m$ dilemparkan vertikal ke atas di udara dari lantai dengan kecepatan awal $v_0$. Jika ada gaya konstan akibat gesekan/hambatan udara selama melayang dan asumsikan percepatan gravitasi bumi konstan, maka tentukan:

- (a) tinggi maksimum yang dicapai (nyatakan dalam: $v_0$, $m$, $g$, dan $F$)
- (b) laju batu saat menyentuh lantai kembali (nyatakan dalam: $v_0$, $m$, $g$, dan $F$)

- (a) tinggi maksimum yang dicapai (nyatakan dalam: 0, , , dan )

title_en: Vertical Upward Throw with Constant Drag Force
body_md_en:
A stone of mass $m$ is thrown vertically upward from the ground with an initial velocity $v_0$. Assuming a constant resistive force due to air drag acts on the stone during its flight and the acceleration due to gravity is constant, determine:

- (a) the maximum height reached (express in terms of: $v_0$, $m$, $g$, and $F$)
- (b) the speed of the stone when it hits the ground again (express in terms of: $v_0$, $m$, $g$, and $F$)

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: the maximum height reached (express in terms of: $v_0$, $m$, $g$, and $F$)

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: the speed of the stone when it hits the ground again (express in terms of: $v_0$, $m$, $g$, and $F$)

title_en: Minimum Force to Prevent the Block from Sliding Down in a Two-Block System
body_md_en:
A system consists of two blocks with masses $m_1$ and $m_2$, respectively (see figure). The coefficient of friction between the two blocks is $μ$, and there is no friction between the blocks and the floor. Determine the magnitude of the force that must be applied to the block so that it does not slide downward (express your answer in terms of: $m_1$, $m_2$, $μ$, and $g$).

![](_page_0_Picture_13.jpeg)

title_en: Final Speed of the Cart Due to People Running and Jumping
body_md_en:
A cart of mass can move freely without friction on a straight track. Initially, there are people, each of mass, standing at rest on the cart, which is also at rest. Consider 2 cases.

- (a) All people on the cart run together to one end of the cart with a speed relative to the cart and then jump off together. What is the speed of the cart after these people jump off?
- (b) Now consider the second case. The cart and all people are initially at rest. In this second case, all people run one after another. So the first person runs off the cart with a speed relative to the cart, followed by the second person running to the same end with a speed relative to the cart. This continues until the nth person. What is the final speed of the cart?
- (c) In which case is the final speed of the cart higher?

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: All people on the cart run together to one end of the cart with a speed relative to the cart and then jump off together. What is the speed of the cart after these people jump off?

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: Now consider the second case. The cart and all people are initially at rest. In this second case, all people run one after another. So the first person runs off the cart with a speed relative to the cart, followed by the second person running to the same end with a speed relative to the cart. This continues until the nth person. What is the final speed of the cart?

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: In which case is the final speed of the cart higher?

title_en: Oscillation Period of a Two-Spring System Connected via a Pulley
body_md_en: The spring-mass system below consists of a block of mass $m$ and two springs with spring constants $k_1$ and $k_2$. The mass can oscillate up and down, but its orientation is kept horizontal. The two springs are connected by a massless string passing over a frictionless pulley. What is the oscillation period of the system? (express in terms of: $m$, $k_1$, and $k_2$)

title: Kecepatan Sudut Maksimum Cincin dengan Manik-Manik agar Tidak Melompat
body_md:
Sebuah cincin dengan massa mempunyai suatu titik manik-manik ditempel di pinggiran cincin itu. Massa manikmanik juga. Jari-jari cincin adalah (momen inersia cincin = 2 ). Abaikan dimensi manik-manik (anggap seperti massa titik). Cincin dan manik-manik bergerak bersama. Mula-mula kecepatan sudut mereka adalah $^0$ dan manikmanik berada di posisi paling rendah. Berapakah nilai maksimum $^0$ agar sistem tidak melompat saat manik-manik berada pada posisi tertinggi? Anggap lantai kasar, sehingga sistem cincin–manik-manik bisa menggelinding tanpa slip.

![](_page_1_Picture_9.jpeg)

title_en: Maximum Angular Velocity of a Ring with a Bead to Prevent Jumping
body_md_en:
A ring of mass $M$ has a bead attached to its rim. The bead's mass is $m$. The ring's radius is $R$ (the ring's moment of inertia is $MR^2$). Neglect the dimensions of the bead (treat it as a point mass). The ring and bead move together. Initially, their angular velocity is $^0$ and the bead is at the lowest position. What is the maximum value of $^0$ so that the system does not jump when the bead is at the highest position? Assume a rough floor, so the ring-bead system can roll without slipping.

![](_page_1_Picture_9.jpeg)

title_en: Modeling a Massive Spring as a Two-Mass and Two-Spring System
body_md_en:
A spring has a spring constant $k$ and a mass $m$. To simplify calculations, this spring can be modeled as a system consisting of masses and springs. As a first approximation, assume this massive spring system is equivalent to a mass-spring system consisting of two identical masses $m'$ and two identical massless springs with spring constant $k'$. If we continuously increase the number of masses and springs in this model, it will more closely approximate the actual spring. Initially, the system is left in equilibrium. The length of the spring becomes $L_0$ (its relaxed length is 0). If the top end A is cut,

- (a) what is the acceleration of the lower mass according to this model?
- (b) what is the acceleration of the upper mass according to this model?

Assume the acceleration due to gravity is constant.

![](_page_2_Picture_7.jpeg)

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: what is the acceleration of the lower mass according to this model?

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text:
what is the acceleration of the upper mass according to this model?

Assume the acceleration due to gravity is constant.

title_en: Work Done by a Force on a Two-Block System with Friction
body_md_en:
There are two blocks, each with mass $m_1$ and $m_2$. The coefficient of friction between block 1 and the floor is $μ_1$, while the coefficient of friction between block 1 and block 2 is $μ_2$. A horizontal force $F$ is applied to block 1, which is large enough so that block 1 slides on top of block 2, and block 2 also moves due to this force (assuming $F$ is sufficiently large). If block 1 moves a distance $s$ relative to block 2, what is the work done by force $F$? For easier calculation, assume: $m_1 = 2$, $m_2 = 5.6$ kg, $μ_2 = 0.5$, $μ_1 = 0.1$.

![](_page_2_Picture_10.jpeg)

title: Roller Coaster dengan Celah di Puncak Lintasan Melingkar
body_md: Sebuah taman hiburan membuat tantangan baru bagi pengunjungnya. *Roller coaster* yang dibangun di taman hiburan ini tidak mempunyai bagian atasnya, seperti pada gambar. Berapa ketinggian agar *roller coaster* dapat dengan mendarat kembali setelah melewati celah di puncak *roller coaster*. Jari-jari lintasan adalah dengan sudut bukaan puncak adalah 2.

title_en: Roller Coaster with a Gap at the Top of a Circular Track
body_md_en: An amusement park introduces a new challenge for its visitors. The *roller coaster* built in this park lacks its top section, as shown in the figure. What height is required for the *roller coaster* to land back safely after passing through the gap at the top of the *roller coaster*? The radius of the track is R and the opening angle at the top is 2θ.

title: Gerak Peluru dengan Tumbukan Berulang dan Koefisien Restitusi
body_md:
Sebuah bola pada ketinggian ℎ dari permukaan lantai ditembakkan secara horizontal dengan kecepatan 0. Bola mengenai lantai dan memantul kembali. Proses tumbukan tersebut berlangsung elastik sebagian dengan koefisien restitusi . Bola akan terus memantul berkali-kali sampai akhirnya tidak dapat memantul lagi. Tentukan kapan () ini terjadi. Berapakah jarak horizontal , yang ditempuh bola sampai keadaan ini?

![](_page_0_Figure_9.jpeg)

title_en: Projectile Motion with Repeated Collisions and Coefficient of Restitution
body_md_en:
A ball at a height $h$ above the floor is launched horizontally with an initial speed $v_0$. It strikes the floor and bounces back. The collision is partially elastic, characterized by a coefficient of restitution $e$. The ball continues to bounce repeatedly until it eventually ceases to bounce. Determine the time $t$ at which this occurs. What is the total horizontal distance $x$ traveled by the ball until this state?

![](_page_0_Figure_9.jpeg)

title: Kondisi Awal Agar Massa Tepat Mencapai Langit-Langit pada Sistem Karet Elastis
body_md:
Sebuah karet ringan (massa dapat diabaikan) digantungkan pada langit-langit. Panjang karet dalam keadaan tidak tegang adalah 0. Jika karet ditarik, maka karet dapat dianggap seperti pegas (yang memenuhi hukum Hooke). Karet tidak memberikan gaya pulih ketika panjangnya lebih kecil dari 0. Sebuah massa A digantung pada karet ini sehingga panjang karet (dalam keadaan setimbang) berubah menjadi 1. Kemudian massa A ditarik ke bawah sampai panjang karet menjadi 2. Berapakah panjang $^2$ agar saat massa A dilepas (dari keadaan diam), dapat persis menyentuh langitlangit? Nyatakan jawaban anda dalam $^0$ dan 1.

![](_page_0_Picture_12.jpeg)

Berapakah panjang <sup>2</sup> agar saat massa A dilepas (dari keadaan diam), dapat persis menyentuh langitlangit? Nyatakan jawaban anda dalam <sup>0</sup> dan 1.

title_en: Initial Condition for a Mass to Just Reach the Ceiling in an Elastic Rubber Band System
body_md_en:
A light rubber band (mass negligible) is suspended from the ceiling. The length of the rubber band in its unstretched state is 0. When the rubber band is stretched, it can be treated as a spring (obeying Hooke's law). The rubber band does not exert a restoring force when its length is less than 0. A mass A is hung from this rubber band so that the length of the rubber band (in equilibrium) becomes 1. Then, mass A is pulled downward until the length of the rubber band becomes 2. What must the length $^2$ be so that when mass A is released (from rest), it exactly touches the ceiling? Express your answer in terms of $^0$ and 1.

![](_page_0_Picture_12.jpeg)

title: Daya Motor untuk Menahan Pusat Massa Yoyo pada Bidang Miring Licin
body_md:
Sebuah yoyo dengan massa $m$, jari-jari dalam $r$ dan jari-jari luar $R$ diletakkan di atas sebuah bidang miring dengan sudut kemiringan $	heta$. Momen inersia yoyo terhadap pusat massanya adalah $ rac{1}{2}mR^2$. Di ujung atas terdapat sebuah motor yang akan digunakan untuk menggulung benang dari yoyo. Bidang miring licin dan posisi motor diatur sedemikian rupa sehingga benang sejajar dengan bidang miring (lihat gambar). Mula-mula semua sistem dijaga diam. Saat yoyo dilepas, motor mulai bekerja dengan kecepatan putar diatur sedemikian rupa sehingga pusat massa yoyo tidak mengalami perubahan posisi. Tentukan berapa besar daya motor sebagai fungsi waktu agar dapat memberikan keadaan ini.

![](_page_1_Picture_6.jpeg)
body_md_raw:
Sebuah yoyo dengan massa , jari-jari dalam dan jari-jari luar diletakkan di atas sebuah bidang miring dengan sudut kemiringan . Momen inersia yoyo terhadap pusat massanya adalah 2 /2. Di ujung atas terdapat sebuah motor yang akan digunakan untuk menggulung benang dari yoyo. Bidang miring licin dan posisi motor diatur sedemikian rupa sehingga benang sejajar dengan bidang miring (lihat gambar). Mula-mula semua sistem dijaga diam. title_en: Motor Power to Hold the Yoyo's Center of Mass on a Smooth Inclined Plane
body_md_en:
A yoyo with mass $m$, inner radius $r$, and outer radius $R$ is placed on an inclined plane with an inclination angle $	heta$. The moment of inertia of the yoyo about its center of mass is $ rac{1}{2}mR^2$. At the top, there is a motor that will be used to wind the string from the yoyo. The inclined plane is smooth, and the motor's position is adjusted such that the string is parallel to the inclined plane (see figure). Initially, the entire system is held at rest. When the yoyo is released, the motor starts operating with its rotational speed adjusted such that the yoyo's center of mass does not change position. Determine the motor's power as a function of time required to maintain this condition.

![](_page_1_Picture_6.jpeg)

title_en: Acceleration of Masses in a Pulley System with an L-Shaped Block
body_md_en:
Consider the system as shown in the figure below. An L-shaped mass is connected to a mass by a string that passes over 3 pulleys. Mass $m_1$ is in direct contact with the wall. Mass $m_2$... Initially, the system is at rest. Determine the acceleration vector when the masses are released. Note: Assume the masses cannot tip over and the string is inextensible. The mass of the string, the mass of the pulleys, and all friction are neglected.

title_en: Minimum Coefficient of Friction to Keep the Inclined Plane Stationary While the Ball Rolls
body_md_en:
A ball of mass $m$ and radius $R$ ($I = \frac{2}{5}mR^2$) is placed on an inclined plane of mass $M$. There is sufficient friction between the ball and the inclined plane so that the ball rolls down without slipping. What is the minimum coefficient of static friction between the inclined plane and the floor to ensure the inclined plane remains completely stationary during this process?

title_en: Homogeneous Rod Leaning Against the Floor and Suspended by a String
body_md_en:
One end of a homogeneous rod (mass and length ) is suspended by a string, while the other end rests on the floor in a stationary state. While stationary, the rod forms an angle with the horizontal.

![](_page_0_Picture_9.jpeg)

- (a) Determine the tension force in the string.
- (b) If the string is now cut and the rod begins to fall, calculate the vertical component of the acceleration of the rod's center of mass at the initial time = 0, i.e., immediately after the string is cut. Neglect friction between the rod and the floor.
- (c) Determine the force exerted by the rod on the floor at time = 0, i.e., immediately after the string is cut. (Hint: this force is different from the force before the string was cut.)

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: Determine the tension force in the string.

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: If the string is now cut and the rod begins to fall, calculate the vertical component of the acceleration of the rod's center of mass at the initial time = 0, i.e., immediately after the string is cut. Neglect friction between the rod and the floor.

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: Determine the force exerted by the rod on the floor at time = 0, i.e., immediately after the string is cut. (Hint: this force is different from the force before the string was cut.)

title: Sistem Dua Massa dengan Pegas dan Kondisi Lepas dari Lantai
body_md:
Sebuah sistem dua benda masing-masing bermassa dihubungkan oleh pegas dengan konstanta pegas yang tersusun seperti pada gambar samping. Jika pada saat kita menahan benda yang di atas sedemikian sehingga pegasnya tertekan sejauh dari panjang normalnya, maka tentukan nilai agar benda bawah dapat lepas kontak dengan lantai?

body_md_raw:

title_en: Cone Rolling Without Slipping on a Flat Surface
body_md_en:
A cone with apex angle and base radius rolls uniformly and without slipping on a flat surface (as shown in the figure). A point on the base of the cone moves with speed . The apex of the cone rests on a point with the line (cone axis) parallel to the flat surface. Calculate:

- (a) the magnitude of the angular velocity of the cone,
- (b) the angle of the angular velocity vector of the cone with respect to the vertical axis,
- (c) the magnitude of the angular acceleration of the cone.

title: Gerak Balok dengan Gesekan dan Lintasan Parabola dari Ujung Lantai

subparts.label: a
subparts.text: kecepatan benda sesaat setelah lepas dari ujung lantai,

subparts.label: b
subparts.text: percepatan benda saat meluncur di atas lantai,

subparts.label: c
subparts.text: jarak yang telah ditempuh oleh benda sebelum lepas meninggalkan lantai.

body_md:
Benda bermassa $m$ mula-mula meluncur di atas lantai dengan kecepatan $v_{0}$ dan setelah sampai di titik $A$ benda lepas meninggalkan ujung lantai dan mendarat di ujung bawah tangga yaitu di titik $B$. Diketahui $μ_k$ adalah koefisien gesek kinetik antara benda dan lantai, percepatan gravitasi $g$, dan gesekan udara diabaikan. Dengan menyatakan jawaban dalam $m$, $v_{0}$, $μ_k$, $g$, $h$, dan $L$, tentukan:

- (a) kecepatan benda sesaat setelah lepas dari ujung lantai,
- (b) percepatan benda saat meluncur di atas lantai,
- (c) jarak yang telah ditempuh oleh benda sebelum lepas meninggalkan lantai.

![](_page_1_Picture_15.jpeg)
body_md_raw:
Benda bermassa mula-mula meluncur di atas lantai dengan kecepatan <sup>0</sup> dan setelah sampai di titik benda lepas meninggalkan ujung lantai dan mendarat di ujung bawah tangga yaitu di titik . Diketahui adalah koefisien gesek kinetik antara benda dan lantai, percepatan gravitasi, dan gesekan udara diabaikan. Dengan menyatakan jawaban dalam , 0, , , , dan , tentukan:

- (a) kecepatan benda sesaat setelah lepas dari ujung lantai,
- (b) percepatan benda saat meluncur di atas lantai,

title_en: Motion of a Block with Friction and Parabolic Trajectory from the Edge of the Floor
body_md_en:
A block of mass $m$ initially slides across a floor with speed $v_{0}$. Upon reaching point $A$, the block leaves the edge of the floor and lands at the bottom of a staircase at point $B$. Given that $μ_k$ is the coefficient of kinetic friction between the block and the floor, $g$ is the acceleration due to gravity, and air resistance is neglected. Express your answers in terms of $m$, $v_{0}$, $μ_k$, $g$, $h$, and $L$. Determine:

- (a) the speed of the block immediately after leaving the edge of the floor,
- (b) the acceleration of the block while sliding on the floor,
- (c) the distance traveled by the block before leaving the floor.

![](_page_1_Picture_15.jpeg)

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: the speed of the block immediately after leaving the edge of the floor,

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: the acceleration of the block while sliding on the floor,

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: the distance traveled by the block before leaving the floor.

title_en: Collision of a Particle with a Homogeneous Rod and Pure Rotation Condition
body_md_en:
A homogeneous rod of mass $M$ and length $L$ is on a flat table and is initially aligned parallel to the $x$-axis. A body of mass $m$ moving in the $x$-direction with speed $v_0$ collides with the rod at point $P$. The moment of inertia of the rod about its center of mass is $(1/12)ML^2$.

- (a) Determine the location of point $P$ or the magnitude $d$ (expressed in terms of $L$) such that immediately after the collision, the rod undergoes pure instantaneous rotation about a rotation axis passing through point $P$.
- (b) Given that the body collides elastically with the rod at point $P$ with $d = 3/4 L$. After the collision, when the rod becomes parallel to the $y$-axis for the first time, determine the distance between point $P$ at the end of the rod and the body, expressed in terms of $L$ (for simpler calculations, assume $M = m$).

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: Determine the location of point $P$ or the magnitude $d$ (expressed in terms of $L$) such that immediately after the collision, the rod undergoes pure instantaneous rotation about a rotation axis passing through point $P$.

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: Given that the body collides elastically with the rod at point $P$ with $d = 3/4 L$. After the collision, when the rod becomes parallel to the $y$-axis for the first time, determine the distance between point $P$ at the end of the rod and the body, expressed in terms of $L$ (for simpler calculations, assume $M = m$).

Dasar dari bola pertama, 1, berada pada ketinggian $h$ di atas lantai, sedangkan dasar dari bola ke-$i$, berada pada ketinggian $h + i 	ext{·} d$ di atas lantai.

# Program Persiapan OSN Fisika Dibimbing langsung oleh Kak Basyir - Peraih Medali EMAS OSN Fisika 2018

Apa itu FZTI?

From Zero to Infinity adalah program pelatihan fisika yang dirancang untuk membawa siswa:

- dari konsep dasar
- 🔁 menuju cara berpikir olimpiade

Program ini cocok untuk kamu yang ...
 Baru mulai tertarik fisika olimpiade
 Ingin persiapan OSN lebih awal & terstruktur
 Mau punya fondasi kuat sebelum OSK

•Ingin belajar **lebih dalam dari fisika sekolah** *™* Tidak perlu jago dulu — program ini dimulai dari nol.

### **Target Peserta**

- •Siswa SMP Kelas 9 dan SMA Kelas 10-11
- Cocok untuk:
  - Pemula (belaiar dari nol)
  - Siswa berpengalaman (pengayaan soal level tinggi)
- © Cocok untuk Target OSN
  - Persiapan dini OSK
- Fondasi kuat menuju OSP & OSN
- Sangat ideal mulai dari SMP kelas 3

- Online & fleksibel
- · Modul PDF lengkap
- Solusi detail semua soal
- Video pembahasan
- · Bisa diulang kapan saja
- Cocok sambil sekolah
- Belajar dari nol sampai level OSN
  - 💵 10 modul mekanika inti
    - @ Materi mencakup:
      - •±95% OSK

      - •±40% OSN
- Setara meng-khatamkan buku

Diskusi langsung dengan **Kak Basyir** Grup WA diskusi (*Focus Group*) Bebas bertanya & berdiskusi konsep

Bukan cuma nonton materi — tapi dilatih cara berpikir fisikawan.

title_en: Bouncing Stacked Balls of Different Masses (Elastic Collision Model)
body_md_en:
Consider a system consisting of $n$ balls, labeled 1, 2, 3, …, $n$, with masses $m_1, m_2, m_3, 	ext{...}, m_n$ (where $m_1 	ext{≫} m_2 	ext{≫} m_3 	ext{≫} m_4 	ext{≫} 	ext{⋯} 	ext{≫} m_n$) stacked vertically as shown in the figure alongside. The bottom of the first ball, 1, is at a height $h$ above the floor, while the bottom of the $i$-th ball is at a height $h + i 	ext{·} d$ above the floor.

![](_page_3_Picture_8.jpeg)

This ball system is dropped from a height $h$. Assume that initially, the balls are separated from each other by a very small distance, and all collisions between the balls are perfectly elastic and occur instantaneously.

- (a) Determine the maximum height reached by the topmost ball (express in terms of $h$ and $n$).
- (b) If $h = 1$ meter, how many balls must be stacked so that the topmost ball can bounce up to a height of $h 	ext{≥} 1000$ meters?

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: Determine the maximum height reached by the topmost ball (express in terms of $h$ and $n$).

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: If $h = 1$ meter, how many balls must be stacked so that the topmost ball can bounce up to a height of $h 	ext{≥} 1000$ meters?

title: Balok Meluncur pada Bidang Miring dengan Dua Jenis Permukaan
body_md:
Sebuah balok kecil bermassa meluncur ke bawah pada sebilah papan yang dimiringkan. Setengah papan bagian atas licin dan setengah bagian yang bawah kasar, sehingga percepatan yang licin tiga kali lebih besar dari yang kasar. Balok mencapai bagian bawah papan dalam waktu 1. Papan kemudian dibalik, setengah bagian atas yang kasar dan setengah bagian bawah yang licin. Pada kondisi ini, balok diluncurkan dari atas dan mencapai bagian bawah papan dalam waktu 2. Jika dalam kedua kasus di atas sudut kemiringan papan tetap sama, tentukan perbandingan $^1$ dan 2, yaitu 1/2!

![](_page_0_Picture_9.jpeg)

title_en: Block Sliding Down an Inclined Plane with Two Types of Surfaces
body_md_en:
A small block of mass slides down an inclined board. The upper half of the board is smooth, and the lower half is rough, such that the acceleration on the smooth part is three times greater than on the rough part. The block reaches the bottom of the board in time $t_1$. The board is then flipped, so the upper half is rough and the lower half is smooth. Under this condition, the block is released from the top and reaches the bottom of the board in time $t_2$. If the angle of inclination of the board remains the same in both cases, determine the ratio of $t_1$ to $t_2$, i.e., $t_1/t_2$!

![](_page_0_Picture_9.jpeg)

title: Dinamika Bola Biliar: Impuls Miring, Slip, dan Menggelinding

body_md:
Sebuah bola biliar (massa dan jejari ) berada di atas meja dalam keadaan bebas. Bola itu dipukul oleh tongkat biliar secara tidak frontal dengan impuls sebesar sedemikian rupa sehingga bola tersebut bergerak dengan kecepatan awal $^0$ dan kemudian berputar balik dengan kecepatan rotasi awal $^0$ terhadap sumbu horizontal dan tegak lurus terhadap arah gerak, akibat adanya gaya gesek (dengan menganggap gaya friksinya konstan). Sudut impuls terhadap garis horizontal adalah , dan bola dipukul pada jarak = − dari permukaan meja, seperti ditunjukkan pada gambar. Tentukan:

- (a) waktu yang dibutuhkan bola untuk bergerak slip sebelum ia menggelinding.
- (b) kondisi agar bola biliar setelah dipukul bergerak menuju pemukul.
- (c) sudut agar bola berotasi saja (tidak slip dan kemudian menggelinding).

title_en: Billiard Ball Dynamics: Oblique Impulse, Slipping, and Rolling
body_md_en:
A billiard ball (mass and radius ) rests on a table. The ball is struck by a cue stick non-head-on with an impulse such that it acquires an initial velocity $^0$ and subsequently reverses its rotation with an initial angular velocity $^0$ about a horizontal axis perpendicular to the direction of motion, due to friction (assuming a constant friction force). The angle of the impulse relative to the horizontal is , and the ball is struck at a distance = − from the table surface, as shown in the figure. Determine:

- (a) the time required for the ball to slip before it begins to roll.
- (b) the condition for the billiard ball to move toward the cue after being struck.
- (c) the angle such that the ball rotates only (no slipping, then rolls).

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: the time required for the ball to slip before it begins to roll.

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: the condition for the billiard ball to move toward the cue after being struck.

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: the angle such that the ball rotates only (no slipping, then rolls).

Pada saat awal ($t = 0$), salah satu ujung tongkat tadi menyenggol ujung lancip sebuah benda sehingga sesaat setelah senggolan tersebut tongkat bergerak dengan kondisi masih sejajar dengan tongkat sebelum senggolan dan titik tengah tongkat tetap bergerak ke arah yang sama dengan sebelum senggolan, tetapi sekarang kelajuan titik tengah tongkat berkurang hingga menjadi $ rac{3}{4}v_0$.

title_en: Collision of a Rod with a Fixed Point and Conservation of Angular Momentum
body_md_en:
The figure shows a rod (mass $m$, length $L$) moving without rotation on a smooth horizontal table with velocity $v_0$ in a direction perpendicular to the rod. At the initial moment ($t = 0$), one end of the rod strikes the sharp tip of an object, so that immediately after the collision, the rod continues to move parallel to its original orientation, and the midpoint of the rod continues moving in the same direction as before, but its speed has decreased to $ rac{3}{4}v_0$.

![](_page_1_Picture_7.jpeg)

# Determine:

- (a) the angular velocity of the rod immediately after the collision (hint: the total angular momentum about the collision point is conserved during the collision).
- (b) the total kinetic energy of the rod immediately after the collision.
- (c) the speeds of both ends of the rod immediately after the collision.

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: the angular velocity of the rod immediately after the collision (hint: the total angular momentum about the collision point is conserved during the collision).

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: the total kinetic energy of the rod immediately after the collision.

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: the speeds of both ends of the rod immediately after the collision.

title_en: Dynamics of a Yo-Yo with a Moving String End
body_md_en:
A yo-yo in the form of a cylinder (mass $m$, radius $R$) is wound with a string that does not slip. The end of the string is attached to the ceiling. When the yo-yo is released and moves downward with velocity $v_0$ (with the string remaining vertical), the ceiling simultaneously moves upward by a displacement $y$. Calculate:

- (a) determine the downward acceleration of the yo-yo.
- (b) describe the motion of the yo-yo if the system is initially at rest and the ceiling moves upward with an acceleration of $2g$.

![](_page_2_Picture_1.jpeg)

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: determine the downward acceleration of the yo-yo.

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: describe the motion of the yo-yo if the system is initially at rest and the ceiling moves upward with an acceleration of $2g$.

title_en: Coaxial Cylinder Rolling on a Movable Inclined Plane
body_md_en:
Consider a coaxial cylinder placed on a rough inclined plane (with surface friction coefficient $μ$) as shown in the figure below. The inner cylinder is uniform and has radius $r$, while the outer cylinder is also uniform and has radius $R$. The inclined plane has mass $M$.

![](_page_2_Picture_13.jpeg)

Initially, the cylinder is at rest at the top of the inclined plane, then it moves downward by pure rolling, causing the inclined plane to move horizontally along a frictionless floor. Given that the masses of the outer and inner cylinders are $m_1$ and $m_2$ respectively, determine:

- (a) the moment of inertia of the cylinder about its center of mass,
- (b) the acceleration of the cylinder and the magnitude of the friction force involved,
- (c) the acceleration of the inclined plane.

subparts_en.text: the moment of inertia of the cylinder about its center of mass,

subparts_en.text: the acceleration of the cylinder and the magnitude of the friction force involved,

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: the acceleration of the inclined plane.

title_en: Projectile Motion Toward a House Roof with Minimum Travel Time

A projectile is fired toward the roof/ceiling of a house with initial velocity $v_0$ at an angle $	heta$ with respect to the horizontal plane (see figure). If the shape of the house's ceiling is as shown in the figure, determine:

title: Kecepatan Komet Encke di Aphelium dan Perihelium
body_md: Komet Encke telah ditemukan oleh Pierre Mechain pada tahun 1786. Periode perputaran komet ini baru dapat ditentukan oleh Johan Encke pada tahun 1822, yaitu selama 3,3 tahun. Pada tahun 1913, berdasarkan hasil foto yang dilakukan melalui teleskop, diketahui jarak terjauh dari Matahari (*aphelium*) adalah = 6,1 × 1011m dan jarak terdekatnya (*perihelium*) = 5,1 × 1010m. Diketahui tetapan gravitasi universal = 6,7 × 10−11 N m$^2$ kg−2 , massa Matahari = 2,0 × 1030kg, tentukan kelajuan komet itu pada titik terjauh dan pada titik terdekat dari Matahari.
body_md_raw: Komet Encke telah ditemukan oleh Pierre Mechain pada tahun 1786. Periode perputaran komet ini baru dapat ditentukan oleh Johan Encke pada tahun 1822, yaitu selama 3,3 tahun. Pada tahun 1913, berdasarkan hasil foto yang dilakukan melalui teleskop, diketahui jarak terjauh dari Matahari (*aphelium*) adalah = 6,1 × 1011m dan jarak terdekatnya (*perihelium*) = 5,1 × 1010m. Diketahui tetapan gravitasi universal = 6,7 × 10−11 N m<sup>2</sup> kg−2 , massa Matahari = 2,0 × 1030kg, tentukan kelajuan komet itu pada titik terjauh dan pada titik terdekat dari Matahari.

title_en: Speed of Comet Encke at Aphelion and Perihelion
body_md_en: Comet Encke was discovered by Pierre Mechain in 1786. The orbital period of this comet could only be determined by Johan Encke in 1822, namely 3.3 years. In 1913, based on photographic results taken through a telescope, it was known that the farthest distance from the Sun (*aphelion*) is = 6,1 × 1011m and the closest distance (*perihelion*) = 5,1 × 1010m. Given the universal gravitational constant = 6,7 × 10−11 N m$^2$ kg−2, the mass of the Sun = 2,0 × 1030kg, determine the speed of the comet at the farthest point and at the closest point to the Sun.

Dalam percobaan fisika, dua bola yang kerapatannya sama, masing-masing berjari-jari $R$ dan $2R$, disusun sedemikian sehingga pusat massa bola yang lebih besar terletak pada titik tengah kereta yang massanya $M$ dan panjangnya $L$. Kedua bola dapat menggelinding tanpa slip sedemikian rupa sehingga garis hubung pusat massa antara bola besar dengan bola kecil selalu membentuk sudut yang konstan terhadap arah horizontal. title_en: Two Rolling Balls on a Cart Pulled by a Horizontal Force
body_md_en:
In a physics experiment, two balls of equal density, each with radii $R$ and $2R$, are arranged such that the center of mass of the larger ball is located at the midpoint of a cart of mass $M$ and length $L$. The mass of the smaller ball is $m$. Both balls roll without slipping in such a way that the line connecting the centers of mass of the large and small balls always maintains a constant angle with respect to the horizontal direction. To maintain this configuration of the two balls, the cart is pulled by a horizontal force (see figure).

#### Determine:

- (a) the magnitude of this force (express in terms of $M$, $m$, and $R$),
- (b) the time required for both balls to fall off the cart (express in terms of $L$, $R$, and $g$).

title_en: Inelastic Collision and Angular Momentum of a Pendulum
body_md_en:
A pendulum consists of a ball of mass attached to the end of a rigid rod of mass and length 2. The center of the rod serves as the axis of rotation. A basket of negligible mass is attached to the other end of the rod. A second ball of mass /2 is thrown into the basket and has a speed when it exactly strikes the basket (see figure). Calculate:

- (a) the initial angular speed of the pendulum after the second ball arrives and gets trapped in the basket?
- (b) the total mechanical energy lost when the second ball arrives and gets trapped in the basket?
- (c) the minimum speed of the incoming second ball so that the pendulum can flip? (meaning the pendulum can rotate 180°)

title_en: Elastic Collision of Two Homogeneous Rods on a Frictionless Surface
body_md_en:
Two homogeneous rods, each 1 m long and with masses of 1 kg and 2 kg respectively, lie parallel to each other on a smooth horizontal plane as shown in the figure below (viewed from above). Rod B is initially at rest at $x=0, y=0$ until $x=1$ m. Rod A moves with a constant velocity of 1 m/s in the positive direction. The right end of rod A reaches $(0,0)$ at $t=0$ s and undergoes an elastic collision with the left end of rod B. Determine the speed of the center of mass and the magnitude of the angular velocity of each rod after the collision.

![](_page_2_Picture_9.jpeg)

title_en: Rotational Dynamics of a Homogeneous Rod Pivoted at One End
body_md_en:
A homogeneous wooden rod of mass and length. One of its ends (point ) is fixed as a pivot so that the rod can rotate in a vertical plane. Friction at the pivot is neglected. The other free end of the rod (point ) is initially held in a vertical position above the pivot, then the rod is released. Determine:

- (a) the angular acceleration of the rod when it makes an angle with the vertical.
- (b) at that angle, determine the magnitude of the linear acceleration of the free end of the rod.

title: Kecepatan Relatif Dua Partikel akibat Interaksi Gravitasi
body_md: Tinjau dua buah partikel bermassa $m_1$ dan $m_2$ yang mula-mula diam satu sama lain dan terpisah pada jarak yang sangat jauh. Walaupun demikian, mereka masih mengalami interaksi gravitasi dengan tetapan gravitasi $G$, sehingga setelah dilepas dari keadaan diam keduanya bergerak mendekat satu sama lain. Ketika jarak antara keduanya adalah $r$, tentukan kecepatan relatif antara kedua partikel tersebut.

title_en: Relative Velocity of Two Particles Due to Gravitational Interaction
body_md_en: Consider two particles of mass $m_1$ and $m_2$ that are initially at rest relative to each other and separated by a very large distance. Nevertheless, they still experience a gravitational interaction with gravitational constant $G$, so that after being released from rest, they move toward each other. When the distance between them is $r$, determine the relative velocity between the two particles.

title: Tumbukan Elastik Bola dengan Bidang Miring yang Dapat Bergerak

subparts.label: a
subparts.text: Tuliskan komponen horizontal dari momentum linear! Apakah komponen horizontal dari momentum linear ini kekal selama tumbukan?

subparts.label: b
subparts.text: Bila tumbukan lenting sempurna dan permukaan horizontal bidang miring licin, tuliskan persamaan energi kinetik dan sederhanakan persamaan tersebut! Apakah energi kinetik kekal?

subparts.label: c
subparts.text: Selama tumbukan, tuliskan komponen tangensial dari kecepatan bola! Ke manakah arah gaya kontak bola terhadap permukaan bidang miring? Apakah ada perubahan nilai komponen tangensial dari kecepatan bola?

subparts.label: d
subparts.text: Tuliskan persamaan kecepatan yang menghubungkan kecepatan bola dan kecepatan bidang miring setelah bola jatuh kembali pada titik awal tumbukan untuk kedua kalinya!

subparts.label: e
subparts.text: Nyatakan kecepatan awal bola $v_0$ dan $v_0^2$ dalam fungsi $v_1$, $v_2$, $\theta$, dan $\alpha$!

subparts.label: f
subparts.text: Tentukan nilai rasio $k$ dalam fungsi $\tan^2\theta$!

body_md:
Sebuah bidang miring dengan sudut kemiringan $\theta$, bermassa $m_2$, berada pada permukaan horizontal yang licin dan dalam keadaan diam. Sebuah bola elastik bermassa $m_1$ bergerak pada arah horizontal dengan kecepatan $v_0$, kemudian menumbuk bidang miring tersebut. Setelah tumbukan, bola terpental dengan kecepatan $v_1$ dan kemudian jatuh kembali pada titik ketika pertama kali bertumbukan. Sementara itu, bidang miring yang awalnya diam, setelah tumbukan, kemudian bergerak ke kanan dengan kecepatan $v_2$. Sudut pantul bola diukur dari permukaan bidang miring adalah $\alpha$. Rasio massa didefinisikan sebagai $k = m_2/m_1$.

![](_page_1_Picture_5.jpeg)

- (a) Tuliskan komponen horizontal dari momentum linear! Apakah komponen horizontal dari momentum linear ini kekal selama tumbukan?
- (b) Bila tumbukan lenting sempurna dan permukaan horizontal bidang miring licin, tuliskan persamaan energi kinetik dan sederhanakan persamaan tersebut! Apakah energi kinetik kekal?
- (c) Selama tumbukan, tuliskan komponen tangensial dari kecepatan bola! Ke manakah arah gaya kontak bola terhadap permukaan bidang miring? Apakah ada perubahan nilai komponen tangensial dari kecepatan bola?
- (d) Tuliskan persamaan kecepatan yang menghubungkan kecepatan bola dan kecepatan bidang miring setelah bola jatuh kembali pada titik awal tumbukan untuk kedua kalinya!
- (e) Nyatakan kecepatan awal bola $v_0$ dan $v_0^2$ dalam fungsi $v_1$, $v_2$, $\theta$, dan $\alpha$!
- (f) Tentukan nilai rasio $k$ dalam fungsi $\tan^2\theta$!

title_en: Elastic Collision of a Ball with a Movable Inclined Plane
body_md_en:
An inclined plane with inclination angle $\theta$ and mass $m_2$ rests on a smooth horizontal surface and is initially at rest. An elastic ball of mass $m_1$ moves horizontally with velocity $v_0$ and then collides with the inclined plane. After the collision, the ball rebounds with velocity $v_1$ and subsequently falls back to the point where it first collided. Meanwhile, the inclined plane, initially at rest, moves to the right with velocity $v_2$ after the collision. The rebound angle of the ball measured from the surface of the inclined plane is $\alpha$. The mass ratio is defined as $k = m_2/m_1$.

![](_page_1_Picture_5.jpeg)

- (a) Write down the horizontal component of linear momentum! Is this horizontal component of linear momentum conserved during the collision?
- (b) If the collision is perfectly elastic and the horizontal surface of the inclined plane is smooth, write down the kinetic energy equation and simplify it! Is kinetic energy conserved?
- (c) During the collision, write down the tangential component of the ball's velocity! In which direction does the contact force of the ball act on the surface of the inclined plane? Is there any change in the magnitude of the tangential component of the ball's velocity?
- (d) Write down the velocity equation that relates the velocity of the ball and the velocity of the inclined plane after the ball falls back to the initial collision point for the second time!
- (e) Express the initial velocity of the ball $v_0$ and $v_0^2$ as functions of $v_1$, $v_2$, $\theta$, and $\alpha$!
- (f) Determine the value of the ratio $k$ as a function of $\tan^2\theta$!

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: Write down the horizontal component of linear momentum! Is this horizontal component of linear momentum conserved during the collision?

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: If the collision is perfectly elastic and the horizontal surface of the inclined plane is smooth, write down the kinetic energy equation and simplify it! Is kinetic energy conserved?

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: During the collision, write down the tangential component of the ball's velocity! In which direction does the contact force of the ball act on the surface of the inclined plane? Is there any change in the magnitude of the tangential component of the ball's velocity?

subparts_en.label: d
subparts_en.text: Write down the velocity equation that relates the velocity of the ball and the velocity of the inclined plane after the ball falls back to the initial collision point for the second time!

subparts_en.label: e
subparts_en.text: Express the initial velocity of the ball $v_0$ and $v_0^2$ as functions of $v_1$, $v_2$, $\theta$, and $\alpha$!

subparts_en.label: f
subparts_en.text: Determine the value of the ratio $k$ as a function of $\tan^2\theta$!

title_en: Rotational Oscillation of a Homogeneous Rod Connected to a Spring
body_md_en:
A homogeneous rod (mass and length ) is pivoted at its center, and both ends are connected to a spring (with spring constant ) so that it can rotate (see figure). The condition shown in the figure is the equilibrium state. If the rod is displaced upward by a small angle and then released,

- (a) Show that the rod will undergo simple harmonic motion.
- (b) Determine its oscillation frequency.
- (c) Calculate the speed of the rod as it passes through its equilibrium position (horizontal).

![](_page_1_Picture_17.jpeg)

title_en: Collision of Two Disks and Conservation of Angular Momentum
body_md_en: A uniform disk of mass and diameter 2 moves toward another uniform disk of mass 2 and diameter 2 on a frictionless table surface. The first disk has an initial velocity of $^0$ and an initial rotational speed of $^0$ as shown in the figure, while the second disk is initially stationary. When the first disk touches the second disk, they immediately move together as a single object.

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: What are the velocity and angular velocity of the combined disk after the collision? Indicate their magnitudes and directions.

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: For what value of $^0$ will the combined disk not rotate?

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: How much total mechanical energy is lost in this collision, assuming the combined disk system does not rotate?

title: Orang Melompat dari Kereta di Rel Licin: Perbandingan Dua Proses

subparts.label: a
subparts.text:
Tunjukkan bahwa kecepatan akhir kereta pada kasus (ii) lebih besar daripada kecepatan akhir pada kasus (i), di mana selisih antara kedua kecepatan akhir tersebut dapat dituliskan sebagai

$$\Delta v_{akhir} = C \sum_{k=0}^{N-1} \frac{k}{M + (N-k)m}$$

subparts.label: b
subparts.text: Carilah nilai tetapan $C$, dinyatakan dalam $M$, $m$, $v$, dan $N$.

body_md:
Sebanyak $N$ orang yang masing-masing bermassa $m$ berdiri di atas suatu kereta bermassa $M$ yang mula-mula diam di atas rel licin (abaikan gesekan kereta dengan rel). Orang-orang tersebut melompat pada ujung kereta dengan kecepatan relatif $v$ terhadap kereta. Dalam hal ini ada dua kasus:

- (i) Semua orang bersama-sama melompat pada waktu yang sama.
- (ii) Satu orang melompat pada suatu waktu, dilanjutkan dengan orang kedua beberapa waktu kemudian, dan seterusnya hingga orang ke-$N$ secara berurutan.

Setelah semua orang melompat dari kereta,

(a) Tunjukkan bahwa kecepatan akhir kereta pada kasus (ii) lebih besar daripada kecepatan akhir pada kasus (i), di mana selisih antara kedua kecepatan akhir tersebut dapat dituliskan sebagai

$$\Delta v_{akhir} = C \sum_{k=0}^{N-1} \frac{k}{M + (N-k)m}$$

(b) Carilah nilai tetapan $C$, dinyatakan dalam $M$, $m$, $v$, dan $N$.

title_en: People Jumping Off a Train on Frictionless Rails: Comparison of Two Processes
body_md_en:
A total of $N$ people, each of mass $m$, are standing on a train of mass $M$ that is initially at rest on frictionless rails (neglect friction between the train and the rails). The people jump off the end of the train with a relative speed $v$ with respect to the train. In this scenario, there are two cases:

- (i) All people jump simultaneously at the same time.
- (ii) One person jumps at a certain time, followed by the second person some time later, and so on, until the $N$-th person jumps sequentially.

After all people have jumped off the train,

(a) Show that the final velocity of the train in case (ii) is greater than the final velocity in case (i), where the difference between these two final velocities can be written as

$$\Delta v_{akhir} = C \sum_{k=0}^{N-1} \frac{k}{M + (N-k)m}$$

(b) Find the value of the constant $C$, expressed in terms of $M$, $m$, $v$, and $N$.

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text:
Show that the final velocity of the train in case (ii) is greater than the final velocity in case (i), where the difference between these two final velocities can be written as

$$\Delta v_{akhir} = C \sum_{k=0}^{N-1} \frac{k}{M + (N-k)m}$$

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: Find the value of the constant $C$, expressed in terms of $M$, $m$, $v$, and $N$.

Program ini cocok untuk kamu yang ...

title_en: Pendulum with a Nail: Minimum Angle for the Ball to Touch the Nail
body_md_en: A sufficiently heavy ball (mass $m$) is suspended by a light, inextensible string (length $L$) from a fixed point $O$ on the ceiling (see figure). ![](_page_3_Picture_0.jpeg) The string and ball are initially displaced from the vertical by an angle $	heta$ and released from rest. A nail is located directly below point $O$ at a distance $d$. There is a specific value of the angle $	heta$ that causes the ball to eventually just touch the nail. Determine the magnitude of this angle $	heta$.

title_en: Quantities and Units
body_md_en:
A block of mass 2 is initially at rest at the bottom of an inclined plane (mass and incline angle ). The inclined plane's surface is frictionless and rests on a frictionless table. At initial time = 0, a bullet of mass and velocity $v_{0}$ moves parallel to the inclined plane (see figure) and collides with block 2, embedding itself inside it (at this moment, the top end of the inclined plane is exactly at the corner of the table).

![](_page_0_Picture_9.jpeg)

#### Calculate:

- (a) the maximum height the block can reach relative to the table surface.
- (b) the velocity of the inclined plane when the block reaches its maximum height.
- (c) the time at which block 2 reaches its maximum height.
- (d) the distance the inclined plane has traveled relative to the table corner when block 2 reaches its maximum height.

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: the maximum height the block can reach relative to the table surface.

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: the velocity of the inclined plane when the block reaches its maximum height.

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: the time at which block 2 reaches its maximum height.

subparts_en.label: d
subparts_en.text: the distance the inclined plane has traveled relative to the table corner when block 2 reaches its maximum height.

title: Bola dan Prisma Segitiga

subparts.label: a
subparts.text: Gambarkan diagram gaya yang bekerja pada sistem bola-prisma tersebut.

subparts.label: b
subparts.text: Tentukan nilai percepatan gerak bola.

subparts.label: c
subparts.text: Tentukan syarat bagi nilai $m/M$.

body_md:
Sebuah bola bermassa $m$ ditempatkan di antara tembok vertikal dan prisma segitiga bermassa $M$. Sisi miring prisma segitiga tersebut memiliki sudut kemiringan $\alpha$ terhadap horisontal. Bola tersebut menyinggung prisma segitiga pada ujung paling atas balok tersebut. Prisma berada pada lantai. Baik bola maupun prisma bergerak tanpa gesekan. Percepatan gravitasi $g$ ke bawah. Lihat gambar. Diinginkan setelah bola dilepas tanpa kecepatan awal, permukaan horizontal prisma segitiga tersebut tetap pada lantai atau tidak miring/berputar.

- (a) Gambarkan diagram gaya yang bekerja pada sistem bola-prisma tersebut.
- (b) Tentukan nilai percepatan gerak bola.
- (c) Tentukan syarat bagi nilai $m/M$.
body_md_raw:
Sebuah bola bermassa ditempatkan di antara tembok vertikal dan prisma segitiga bermassa . Sisi miring prisma segitiga tersebut memiliki sudut kemiringan terhadap horisontal. Bola tersebut menyinggung prisma segitiga pada ujung paling atas balok tersebut. Prisma berada pada lantai. Baik bola maupun prisma bergerak tanpa gesekan. Percepatan gravitasi ke bawah. Lihat gambar. Diinginkan setelah bola dilepas tanpa kecepatan awal, permukaan horizontal prisma segitiga tersebut tetap pada lantai atau tidak miring/berputar.

title_en: Ball and Triangular Prism
body_md_en:
A ball of mass $m$ is placed between a vertical wall and a triangular prism of mass $M$. The inclined face of the triangular prism makes an angle $\alpha$ with the horizontal. The ball touches the triangular prism at its topmost corner. The prism rests on the floor. Both the ball and the prism move without friction. The gravitational acceleration is $g$ downward. See the figure. It is required that after the ball is released from rest, the horizontal surface of the triangular prism remains on the floor without tilting or rotating.

- (a) Draw the force diagram for the ball-prism system.
- (b) Determine the acceleration of the ball.
- (c) Determine the condition for the ratio $m/M$.

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: Draw the force diagram for the ball-prism system.

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: Determine the acceleration of the ball.

subparts_en.label: c
subparts_en.text: Determine the condition for the ratio $m/M$.

title_en: Varying Gravitational Acceleration
body_md_en:
A body of mass is located at a height above the surface of a spherical planet of mass and radius . Assume the value is very large compared to . The gravitational acceleration at the surface of the planet is 0, while the universal gravitational constant is .

- (a) The gravitational acceleration experienced by the body decreases linearly with with a factor of . Determine the gravitational acceleration at height ℎ (express in terms of the parameters above)
- (b) If the body is thrown vertically upward from height ℎ with an initial velocity of 0, determine the velocity of the body as a function of height .
- (c) Determine the maximum height of the body. Also determine the maximum height of the body if the linear constant in question (a) above → 0.

subparts_en.text: The gravitational acceleration experienced by the body decreases linearly with with a factor of . Determine the gravitational acceleration at height ℎ (express in terms of the parameters above)

subparts_en.label: b

subparts_en.label: c

title: Sistem Bola-Batang-Pegas

subparts.label: a
subparts.text: besar frekuensi getaran untuk sudut simpangan yang kecil.

subparts.label: b
subparts.text: nilai maksimum gaya berat agar untuk sudut simpangan kecil tongkat mengalami getaran harmonik.

body_md:
Bola karet dengan berat = dilekatkan dengan kuat di titik pada ujung tongkat (dengan massa batang diabaikan). Sementara pada ujung lain batang yaitu titik dipasang engsel yang melekat kuat pada lantai sehingga batang dapat berotasi di sekitar titik pada bidang (lihat gambar). Pegas dengan konstanta dipasang pada posisi mendatar dengan satu ujung dilekatkan pada dinding dan ujung yang lain dilekatkan pada titik tetap di batang . Pegas dalam kondisi relaks saat batang tegak. Seperti tampak dalam gambar, batang kemudian disimpangkan dari posisi awal (tegak) sebesar sudut lalu dilepaskan sehingga tongkat akan mengalami gerak osilasi (getaran).

![](_page_1_Picture_15.jpeg)

#### Tentukan:

- (a) besar frekuensi getaran untuk sudut simpangan yang kecil.
- (b) nilai maksimum gaya berat agar untuk sudut simpangan kecil tongkat mengalami getaran harmonik.

title_en: Ball-Rod-Spring System
body_md_en:
A rubber ball with weight = is firmly attached at a point on the end of a rod (with the rod's mass neglected). At the other end of the rod, point , a hinge is firmly attached to the floor, allowing the rod to rotate about this point in a plane (see figure). A spring with constant is mounted horizontally, with one end attached to a wall and the other end attached to a fixed point on the rod . The spring is relaxed when the rod is vertical. As shown in the figure, the rod is then displaced from its initial (vertical) position by an angle and released, causing it to undergo oscillatory motion.

![](_page_1_Picture_15.jpeg)

#### Determine:

- (a) the oscillation frequency for small displacement angles.
- (b) the maximum weight value so that for small displacement angles, the rod undergoes harmonic oscillation.

subparts_en.label: a
subparts_en.text: the oscillation frequency for small displacement angles.

subparts_en.label: b
subparts_en.text: the maximum weight value so that for small displacement angles, the rod undergoes harmonic oscillation.

Sebuah batang homogen (massa dan panjang ) salah satu ujungnya diletakan pada tepi sebuah meja dalam posisi vertikal. Batang kemudian dilepaskan dari keadaan diam. Tentukan sudut antara posisi batang terhadap vertikal dimana batang mulai kehilangan kontak dengan meja. Lakukan perhitungan Anda untuk 2 kondisi berikut:

- (a) Tepi meja dianggap licin akan tetapi memiliki siku seperti ditampilkan pada gambar (i).
- (b) Tepi meja kasar dan sangat tajam seperti gambar (ii).

title_en: Rod on a Table Edge
body_md_en:
A uniform rod (mass and length ) has one end placed on the edge of a table in a vertical position. The rod is then released from rest. Determine the angle between the rod and the vertical at which the rod begins to lose contact with the table. Perform your calculations for the following two conditions:

- (a) The table edge is considered smooth but has a right-angle corner as shown in figure (i).
- (b) The table edge is rough and very sharp as shown in figure (ii).

title_en: System of Two Balls Connected by a Rod
body_md_en:
A small ball of mass is attached to a solid cylinder of mass and radius using a massless rod. See the figure. The small ball is located at a distance above the center of the cylinder. The ball-cylinder system is then given a small disturbance from this unstable equilibrium position. The cylinder rolls without slipping. When the ball touches the floor, determine:

- (a) the velocity of the cylinder's center of mass.
- (b) the velocity of the ball.
